title: Senior / QAQC Engineer (A1 Building Main Con)
description:
Senior / QAQC Engineer (A1 Building Main Con)

Our client is a leading A1 main contractor in Singapore with a strong portfolio across both civil engineering and building construction. Known for delivering complex, technically demanding, and large scale projects, the company has established a solid reputation for quality, safety, and engineering excellence. Currently they are looking for a Senior/ QAQC Engineer for an institutional building project.

About the role

The Senior / QAQC Engineer will oversee all quality assurance and quality control aspects of an ongoing building project, ensuring compliance with project specifications, regulatory requirements, and internal quality standards. This role involves leading inspection activities, managing quality documentation, and coordinating closely with consultants, subcontractors, and internal site teams to maintain high workmanship standards.

Key Responsibilities

  • Develop and implement QA/QC plans, ITPs, and project quality procedures.
  • Conduct inspections for architectural, structural, and M&E works.
  • Review method statements, shop drawings, and material submissions.
  • Identify non-conformities and ensure timely corrective actions and closure.
  • Maintain quality documentation including NCRs, RFIs, and inspection records.
  • Ensure compliance with BCA regulations, project specifications, and codes of practice.
  • Support quality audits by clients, consultants, and authorities.
  • Coordinate with project managers, consultants, and subcontractors on quality issues.
  • Provide quality briefings and guidance to site teams and subcontractors.
  • Report quality performance, issues, and progress in site meetings.
  • Lead quality improvement initiatives to reduce defects and enhance workmanship.
  • Support testing, commissioning, and final project handover activities.

Requirements

  • Degree or Diploma in Civil / Structural / Architectural Engineering, Construction Management, or related field.
  • Minimum 5–8 years of QA/QC experience in building construction projects (residential, commercial, industrial, institutional, or mixed-use).
  • Familiarity with BCA requirements, Singapore Standards, and authority submission processes.
  • Experience in structural, architectural, and/or M&E quality control.
  • Strong documentation skills and attention to detail.
  • Able to work independently with strong problem-solving and communication abilities

Location: North, Singapore

Please send your CV outlining your relevant experience to wenyu.jiang@peoplesearch.jobs (Jiang Wenyu, Reg No: R1332558). You may email this great opportunity to someone who would be a great fit for this role. Please indicate your availability, expected salary and reason for leaving current job.

PeopleSearch Pte Ltd

EA License No: 16S8057

postedCompany.description:
PEOPLESEARCH PTE. LTD.


Elevating Careers and Empowering Businesses


PeopleSearch is a leading executive search, recruitment and outplacement services firm with a robust presence in 6 Asian cities: Singapore, Shanghai, Hong Kong, Taipei, Tokyo and Kuala Lumpur. We have been elevating careers and empowering businesses for over 20 years.

We are committed to helping both candidates and companies achieve their goals in concert with one another, hence our dedication to connecting businesses with high-performing executives who make a transformative impact on the bottom line while realising their own career aspirations.


Driving Business Strategies in a Wide Range of Industries


Our human capital solutions are predicated on vast experience, the latest market insights, and a repository of sectoral and geographical knowledge. Our extensive network also gives us access to a large pool of candidates, both active and passive, enabling us to acquire the best professionals in a variety of functional roles to drive your business strategies.

Our clients comprise multinational corporations, small and medium enterprises and start-ups in a wide range of industries including, but not limited to Technology, Healthcare and Life Sciences, Logistics and Supply Chain Management and Financial Services.


An Anticipatory and Bespoke Approach


We are with you every step of the way. As advisers and partners, our specialist consultants take an anticipatory approach, designing precise human capital solutions to help you realise your vision and achieve enduring success. Our bespoke solutions ensure you're future-ready and at the forefront of your field in any business environment.
